Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 275 

PRE_ICL_MOPP_COINS_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Coinsurance Split Network Preferred Mail Order — One-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a one-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP; also known as a preferred mail order 
pharmacy within a split network) during the pre-initial
